nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Index documenting the .claude/rules/ directory layout, available template files, auto-discovery mechanism, and customization workflow for oh-my-claudecode rule injection.

nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Top-level coding style rules enforcing immutability, file organization principles, comprehensive error handling, and schema-based input validation with Zod.

nodes.name: git-workflow.md
nodes.summary: Git workflow rules covering conventional commit format, PR procedures, feature implementation phases, and branch naming conventions.

nodes.name: karpathy-guidelines.md
nodes.summary: Andrej Karpathy-derived behavioral guidelines reducing LLM coding mistakes: think before coding, minimize code to essentials, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution.

nodes.name: performance.md
nodes.summary: Performance rules defining Haiku/Sonnet/Opus model selection strategy, context window management, algorithm efficiency expectations, and project-specific performance targets.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Security rules mandating checks for hardcoded secrets, input validation, injection prevention, and CSRF protection before every commit, plus a secret management code example.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Testing rules requiring 80% minimum coverage across unit, integration, and E2E tests, with mandatory TDD workflow and edge case checklist.
